purpose: Builder-ready brief for the first Skillfoundry internal mechanism for opportunity discovery.

sources.notes: Selected first opportunity and ranking rationale.
Operator-facing note clarifying the mechanism boundary and intended use.

content.body: Build `bottleneck-radar`, an internal MCP mechanism that turns noisy builder signals into ranked bottlenecks and concise opportunity briefs.
Primary users are solo AI builders and small technical automation agencies already using MCP-capable tools and evaluating new developer leverage quickly.
Keep the first release narrow: `analyze_signals` for clustering and ranking evidence-backed bottlenecks, plus `draft_brief` for turning one bottleneck into an opportunity brief.

This artifact is an internal mechanism, not the first public product. It should be deployable and callable by downstream agents, but external pricing and listing decisions belong to the later product lane.
The mechanism should produce briefs that are good enough to hand to design, build, pricing, and growth work once one external product candidate is chosen.

promotion.notes: First mechanism brief candidate aligned to the opportunity-to-launch loop.
